Reliable, High-Quality Repairs and Improvements for Your Home

Get a Free Estimate

Our Services for Homeowners

We provide a wide range of handyman services to keep your home in top condition. From carpentry and painting to renovations and repairs, we ensure your home remains a comfortable and safe place for you and your family.

🔨

Carpentry

Our carpentry services include custom cabinetry, furniture assembly, and structural repairs. Whether you need a small fix or a major renovation, our skilled carpenters deliver high-quality craftsmanship and attention to detail.

🎨

Painting

We offer comprehensive interior and exterior painting services. Our team ensures a flawless finish, using high-quality paints and materials to refresh and protect your home.

🏗️

Renovations and Restorations

From kitchen and bathroom remodels to historical restorations, our renovation services are designed to enhance the beauty and functionality of your home.

🧱

Drywall and Plaster Repair

Our expert drywall and plaster repair services ensure a smooth and seamless finish. We handle everything from small patches to full installations.

🧹

Carpet Cleaning

Our professional carpet cleaning services use state-of-the-art equipment and eco-friendly solutions to remove dirt, stains, and odors, prolonging the life of your carpets and improving indoor air quality.

Why Choose Us

With years of experience serving homeowners in Lansing, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional service and results. Our team is licensed, insured, and committed to providing reliable and efficient solutions tailored to your needs.

We understand the importance of maintaining your home, which is why we focus on quality, attention to detail, and timely service. Our goal is to exceed your expectations and ensure your complete satisfaction with every project we undertake.
